mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, creator, modifier, email_address, remark
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM email_blacklist WHERE deleted_id = 0 AND email_address = #{emailAddress} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM email_blacklist WHERE deleted_id = 0 AND id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM email_blacklist WHERE deleted_id = 0
AND email_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{emailAddress}, '%')
ORDER BY gmt_create DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM email_blacklist WHERE deleted_id = 0
AND email_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{emailAddress}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO email_blacklist ( gmt_create, gmt_modified, creator, modifier, deleted_id, email_address, remark ) VALUES
(NOW(), NOW(), #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, 0, #{item.emailAddress}, #{item.remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_blacklist SET gmt_modified = NOW(), modifier = #{modifier}, deleted_id = id WHERE id = #{id}
